name: Great Cthulhu
abilities: When Great Cthulhu enters play, deal 3 damage to each opponent's abomination. Continuous: Your destruction minions get +1 strength.
flavor: In his house at R'lyeh, dead Cthulhu waits dreaming.

name: Dagon
abilities: When Dagon enters play, you may return a minion from your graveyard to your hand. Continuous: Your deceit minions cannot be targeted by opponent's abilities.
flavor: Father of the Deep Ones, herald of the outer dark.

name: Wendigo
abilities: Rager (+1): This abomination gets +1 strength while attacking.
flavor: Its hunger is without end — it devours flesh and soul alike.

name: Night Gaunt
abilities: Evader (destruction): Cannot be blocked by destruction abominations.
flavor: Silent and faceless, they serve masters spoken of only in dreams.

name: Colour Out of Space
abilities: Target abomination loses 2 strength until end of turn. If that abomination has 0 or less strength, destroy it.
flavor: It was not from any world known to man.

name: Necronomicon
abilities: Tap: Search your deck for a minion with doom Corruption and put it into your hand. Shuffle your deck.
flavor: The book of dead names, written in the blood of the damned.

name: Serpent Man
abilities: When you play Serpent Man onto an abomination of doom Deceit, draw a card.
flavor: They wear the skins of men, but their hearts are cold as scales.

name: Deep One
abilities: Regenerator: When this minion would be destroyed by combat damage
flavor: return it to its owner's hand instead.
image: From the depths they rise, hungry and ancient.

name: Elder Thing
abilities: Host: You can only play this minion as a new abomination.
flavor: Older than mankind, older than the Earth itself.

name: Shoggoth
abilities: When Shoggoth attacks, it deals 1 damage to each of the defender's minions in addition to normal combat damage.
flavor: Tekeli-li! Tekeli-li!

name: Mi-Go Brain Cylinder
abilities: Tap: Look at the top three cards of your deck. Put one into your hand and the rest on the bottom in any order.
flavor: They harvest minds as men harvest wheat.

name: Hastur
abilities: When Hastur enters play, each opponent discards two cards. Continuous: At the start of each opponent's turn, they discard a card.
flavor: He Who Must Not Be Named waits in Carcosa.

name: The King in Yellow
abilities: Target player discards their hand and draws four cards.
flavor: When the Yellow Sign is revealed, sanity is forfeit.

name: Black Goat of the Woods
abilities: When Black Goat of the Woods enters play, put three 1-strength Beast Corruption minion tokens into play. Continuous: Your Beast minions get +1 strength.
flavor: A thousand young, and none of them kind.

name: Flying Polyp
abilities: Guardian: This abomination cannot attack. Nemesis (greed): Cannot be targeted by greed abilities.
flavor: Half-visible horrors from the dawn of time.

name: Yith Mind Swap
abilities: Gain control of target minion until end of turn. It gains Haste and must attack this turn if able.
flavor: They reach across time itself to claim what they desire.

name: Dimensional Shambler
abilities: Fanatic: This abomination can attack even if you played a minion on it this turn.
flavor: It tears holes between worlds with its bare hands.

name: Cthugha
abilities: When Cthugha enters play, deal 2 damage to each abomination. Continuous: Fire-based abilities you control deal 1 extra damage.
flavor: Living fire from the depths of Fomalhaut.

name: Grey Alien Scout
abilities: When Grey Alien Scout deals combat damage, look at the top card of that player's deck.
flavor: They have watched us since before we learned to count the stars.

name: Men in Black
abilities: Nemesis (corruption): Cannot be targeted by corruption abilities. Follower: Cannot be a new abomination.
flavor: They don't exist. That's how you know they're everywhere.

name: Cattle Mutilator
abilities: Destroy target 3-strength or less minion. Its controller gains 1 soul.
flavor: The evidence is always cleaned up before morning.

name: Crop Circle Array
abilities: Tap: Each opponent with fewer souls than you loses 1 soul.
flavor: Messages written in wheat and silence.

name: Hybrid Cultist
abilities: When you play Hybrid Cultist onto an abomination, that abomination reaps +1 soul on its next successful attack.
flavor: Half-born, half-mad, wholly devoted.

name: Star Vampire
abilities: Soulbound: When this minion would be destroyed by combat
flavor: you may stitch it onto another of your abominations instead.
image: It feeds on stars as well as men.
